---
title: "Main_Econometrics_Project"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-27"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r packages}
# ---- Packages ----
packages <- c(
  "readr", "dplyr", "ggplot2", "broom", "tidyr",
  "lmtest", "sandwich", "car", "tibble", "mice", "skimr", "kableExtra"
)

to_install <- packages[!packages %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"]]
if (length(to_install) > 0) install.packages(to_install)

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)
library(car)
library(tibble)
library(mice)
library(tidyr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r load data}
# ---- 1) Load cleaned dataset ----
df <- read_csv("Dataset_Cleaned.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

# ---- REQUIRED COLUMN CHECKS ----
required_cols <- c(
  "country", "iso3c", "year",
  "gdp_pc_growth",
  "inflation",
  "fiscal_balance_pct_gdp",
  "current_account_balance_pct_gdp",
  "gross_capital_formation_pct_gdp",
  "labour_force_participation",
  "exports_pct_gdp"
)

missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(df))
if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(
    paste0(
      "\nERROR: Your dataset is missing required columns:\n- ",
      paste(missing_cols, collapse = "\n- "),
      "\n\nTip: Run names(df) to see the exact column names in your file.\n"
    )
  )
}

# ---- Multiple imputation ----
# This fills missing values before selecting the 2020 cross-section
df_imputed <- mice(df, m = 5, method = "pmm", seed = 123, printFlag = FALSE)
df_complete <- complete(df_imputed, 1)

# ---- Create layman-friendly aliases ----
df <- df_complete %>%
  mutate(
    fiscal = fiscal_balance_pct_gdp,
    current_account = current_account_balance_pct_gdp,
    gross_capital_formation = gross_capital_formation_pct_gdp,
    labor_force = labour_force_participation,
    exports = exports_pct_gdp
  )

# ---- FILTER TO CROSS-SECTIONAL DATA: YEAR 2020 ONLY ----
df <- df %>%
  filter(year == 2020)

if (nrow(df) == 0) {
  stop("\nERROR: No observations found for year 2020 in Dataset_Cleaned.csv\n")
}
```

```{r descriptive}
# ---- 2) Dataset overview ----
cat("\n================ DATASET OVERVIEW ================\n")
cat("Dataset type: Cross-sectional\n")
cat("Year used:", 2020, "\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(df), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(df), "\n")
cat("Countries:", n_distinct(df$country), "\n\n")

df

# ---- 3) Per-country descriptive statistics ----
numeric_vars <- c(
  "gdp_pc_growth", "inflation", "fiscal",
  "current_account", "gross_capital_formation",
  "labor_force", "exports"
)

# ---- 4) Prepare regression dataset ----
model_df <- df %>%
  select(
    country, iso3c, year,
    gdp_pc_growth, inflation, fiscal, current_account,
    gross_capital_formation, labor_force, exports
  ) %>%
  filter(complete.cases(.))

cat("\nObservations used in regressions (2020 complete cases):", nrow(model_df), "\n")

if (nrow(model_df) == 0) {
  stop("\nERROR: No complete-case observations available for the 2020 regression sample.\n")
}

model_df %>%
  select(gdp_pc_growth, inflation, fiscal, current_account,
         gross_capital_formation, labor_force, exports) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), list(
    N      = ~ sum(!is.na(.)),
    Mean   = ~ round(mean(., na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    SD     = ~ round(sd(., na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Min    = ~ round(min(., na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Median = ~ round(median(., na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    Max    = ~ round(max(., na.rm = TRUE), 3)
  ))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to  = c("Variable", "Statistic"),
               names_sep = "_(?=[^_]+$)") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Statistic, values_from = value) %>%
  kable(caption = "Descriptive Statistics — 2020 Cross-Section") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"))
```

Section 2.5 Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
```{r histogram}
# ==========================================================
# ---- HISTOGRAMS FOR EACH VARIABLE ----
# ==========================================================

p_hist_gdp <- ggplot(df, aes(x = gdp_pc_growth)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 25, alpha = 0.85) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of GDP per Capita Growth (2020 Cross-Section)",
    x = "GDP per Capita Growth (%)",
    y = "Frequency"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
print(p_hist_gdp)
```
Section 3.1 - Baseline Model
```{r baseline_model}
# ==========================================================
# ---- BASELINE MODEL ----
# ==========================================================
baseline_model <- lm(
  gdp_pc_growth ~ inflation +
    fiscal +
    current_account +
    gross_capital_formation +
    labor_force +
    exports,
  data = model_df
)

cat("\n================ BASELINE REGRESSION RESULTS ================\n")
print(summary(baseline_model))


cat("\n================ BASELINE MODEL EQUATION (ESTIMATED FROM 2020 CROSS-SECTION) ================\n")
cat(
  "GDPpcGrowth_hat = ",
  round(coef(baseline_model)[1], 3),
  ifelse(coef(baseline_model)["inflation"] >= 0, " + ", " - "),
  abs(round(coef(baseline_model)["inflation"], 3)), "*Inflation",
  ifelse(coef(baseline_model)["fiscal"] >= 0, " + ", " - "),
  abs(round(coef(baseline_model)["fiscal"], 3)), "*Fiscal\n",
  ifelse(coef(baseline_model)["current_account"] >= 0, " + ", " - "),
  abs(round(coef(baseline_model)["current_account"], 3)), "*CurrentAccount",
  ifelse(coef(baseline_model)["gross_capital_formation"] >= 0, " + ", " - "),
  abs(round(coef(baseline_model)["gross_capital_formation"], 3)), "*GrossCapitalFormation",
  ifelse(coef(baseline_model)["labor_force"] >= 0, " + ", " - "),
  abs(round(coef(baseline_model)["labor_force"], 3)), "*LaborForceParticipation",
  ifelse(coef(baseline_model)["exports"] >= 0, " + ", " - "),
  abs(round(coef(baseline_model)["exports"], 3)), "*Exports",
  sep = ""
)
cat("\n===============================================================================================\n")
# ---- VIF (Baseline) ----
cat("\n--- VIF (Baseline model) ---\n")
print(car::vif(baseline_model))

cat("\n===============================================================================================\n")
# ---- Joint hypothesis testing (Baseline) ----
cat("\nJoint hypothesis testing (Baseline)")
linearHypothesis(baseline_model, c("inflation = 0", "fiscal = 0", "labor_force = 0", "exports = 0"))

cat("\n===============================================================================================\n")
# ---- RESET test (Baseline) ----
cat("\nRESET test on baseline model:\n")
print(lmtest::resettest(baseline_model))
```
Section 3.2 - Final Model
```{r final_model}
# ==========================================================
# ---- IMPROVED FINAL MODEL ----
# ==========================================================
final_model <- lm(
  gdp_pc_growth ~ current_account + gross_capital_formation,
  data = model_df
)

cat("\n================ IMPROVED FINAL REGRESSION RESULTS ================\n")
print(summary(final_model))

cat("\n================ IMPROVED FINAL MODEL EQUATION (ESTIMATED FROM 2020 CROSS-SECTION) ================\n")
cat(
  "GDPpcGrowth_hat = ",
  round(coef(final_model)[1], 3),
  ifelse(coef(final_model)["current_account"] >= 0, " + ", " - "),
  abs(round(coef(final_model)["current_account"], 3)), "*CurrentAccount",
  ifelse(coef(final_model)["gross_capital_formation"] >= 0, " + ", " - "),
  abs(round(coef(final_model)["gross_capital_formation"], 3)), "*GrossCapitalFormation\n",
  sep = ""
)
cat("\n===============================================================================================\n")
# ---- Confidence Interval ----
cat("\n--- Confidence Interval ---\n")
confint(final_model)
cat("\n===============================================================================================\n")
# ---- RESET test (Final) ----
cat("\nRESET test on final model:\n")
print(lmtest::resettest(final_model))

# ---- BP test (Final) ----
cat("\n================ IMPROVED FINAL: HETEROSKEDASTICITY CHECKS ================\n")
cat("Breusch–Pagan test:\n")
print(lmtest::bptest(final_model))

critical_value <- qchisq(0.95, df=2)
critical_value
cat("\n===============================================================================================\n")
cat("\nWhite test:\n")
print(lmtest::bptest(final_model, 
                     ~ current_account * gross_capital_formation + 
                       I(current_account^2) + I(gross_capital_formation^2),
                     data = model_df))

# ---- Plot (Improved Final) ----
final_viz_df <- model_df %>%
  mutate(
    final_pred = predict(final_model, newdata = model_df),
    final_resid = resid(final_model)
  )

p_final_rvf <- ggplot(final_viz_df, aes(x = final_pred, y = final_resid)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Residuals vs Fitted: Heteroskedasticity Check (Final)",
    x = "Fitted Values",
    y = "Residuals"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_final_rvf)

############################################################
# End of script
############################################################
```
